movie_detail.title: Experience Yosemite
movie_detail.bodyTextPreview:
SHOWTIMES
COMING SOON

arrow_drop_down
play_arrow
Experience Yosemite 
For Everyone
Release Date Sunday, July 10, 2022 ·  Documentary · 17 min
accessible
vrpano
Virtual Reality
Overview
Experience Yosemite is a cinematic immersive journey through the wonders of Yosemite Valley. Narrated by Bryan Cranston. The new VR film features motion, scent, and haptics to give visitors an unforgettable journey.

As of July 2022, Yosemite Cinema is the only permanently installed VR Cinema in North America. Experience Yosemite was made specifically for this location.
READ MORE expand_more
Director
Joel Newton
Producer
Joel Newton
Cast
Bryan Cranston
